headline: Jim Cramer Said Yum! Brands (YUM) Should Have Paid Money To Sell Pizza Hut
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Discussed Expensive Phones, A Cheap Stock Sector & These 18 Stocks. Yum! Brands, Inc. (NYSE:YUM) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Restaurant firm Yum! Brands, Inc. (NYSE:YUM)’s shares are up by 9.3% over the past year and by 1% year-to-date. The firm was in the news lately […]
